adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: gemini-group-1

model.title: Model
model.description: Supported: gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-1.5-pro, gemini-1.5-flash. The gemini/ prefix will be added automatically if omitted.

max_tokens.title: Maximum Output Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens to limit LLM replies, the maximum possible differs from model to model.

enable_thinking.title: Enable Thinking Mode
enable_thinking.description: Enable extended thinking for supported models. Thinking mode is only supported on: gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.5-flash. When enabled, temperature is forced to 1.

budget_tokens.title: Budget Tokens
budget_tokens.description: Number of tokens allocated for the thinking process. Minimum: 1024.
